subject: Add post-wave merge validation to orchestration.md
description:
Add validation of `execution_context.md` after each context merge to catch corruption or unbounded growth early.

**What to implement:**

1. Add merge validation procedure to `claude/sdd-tools/references/orchestration.md`:
   - After merging per-task context files, validate:
     a. All 6 section headers present (`## Project Setup`, `## File Patterns`, `## Conventions`, `## Key Decisions`, `## Known Issues`, `## Task History`)
     b. Total file size: warn if >500 lines, error if >1000 lines
     c. No content outside of any section header (malformed sections)
   - If validation fails:
     - Log warning in task_log.md
     - Attempt auto-repair: re-insert missing headers
   - If size exceeds 1000 lines:
     - Force compaction of all sections before proceeding
   - Include validation results in wave completion summary (progress streaming)

2. Runs after context merge, before next wave launch
3. Leverages structured schema (Task 1) for reliable header detection

**Files to modify:**
- `claude/sdd-tools/references/orchestration.md` (~611 lines)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] All 6 section headers validated after each merge
- [ ] Warn if >500 lines
- [ ] Error if >1000 lines → force compaction
- [ ] Missing headers → auto-repair (re-insert)
- [ ] Content outside section headers → flagged as malformed
- [ ] Validation results included in wave completion summary

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] All headers present, size normal → no action needed
- [ ] One header missing after merge → auto-repair re-inserts it
- [ ] Compaction triggered → older entries summarized per-section

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Auto-repair fails → log error in task_log.md, continue with best-effort context

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Verify validation logic is clear in orchestration.md
• Integration: Validate during end-to-end execution (Task 15)

Source: internal/specs/execute-tasks-hardening-SPEC.md Section 5.10
